mnemonics: Ethereum's 2.0 upgrade (Serenity) targets a 15-second block time.
Ethereum's Beacon Chain is a transitional phase that precedes the Merge.
keyPoints: Ethereum 2.0 (Serenity) is expected to include Sharding, Proof of Stake (PoS), and Rollups.
The Merge is the process of switching from Proof of Work (PoW) to Proof of Stake (PoS).
Ethereum's Beacon Chain is a system that prepares the transition to Ethereum 2.0.
